lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in poor condition.
This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior and interior show visible signs of wear and aging. The mechanical and electrical systems are currently operational but may need attention soon.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a dependable choice for everyday transportation. While mechanically sound and running well, it does show noticeable signs of its age and usage. The exterior has several visible scratches and a minor door ding, and the paint has faded slightly on the hood. Inside, the upholstery shows some wear on the driver's seat, though the cabin remains clean and smoke-free. It has been regularly serviced, but prospective buyers should expect some upcoming routine maintenance typical for a car of this mileage. Overall, it's a solid, functional vehicle that provides good value for someone looking for reliable transport.

Looking for a reliable value? This vehicle is in fair condition and ready for its next adventure! It shows some clear signs of use and character both inside and out, but it still offers a dependable ride for someone seeking a practical and affordable option. It’s a hard-working car that’s priced to sell and perfect for your daily needs!

This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior is free of any scratches or dents, and the interior shows no signs of wear. All mechanical systems are in perfect working order.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a refined driving experience and proven reliability. Representing an exceptional balance of performance and value, it has undergone a rigorous inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. A premier choice for the discerning driver seeking quality and longevity at a competitive price point.

Hey there! I'm so excited to find a new home for this awesome ride. It’s been super reliable for me and is still in really solid shape, perfect for someone who wants a dependable car that looks great on the road. It drives smoothly and has been well-loved, so it's totally ready for your next big adventure! Feel free to reach out with any questions—I'd love to see this go to someone who will enjoy it as much as I have!

Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Reliable performance.

This vehicle has been meticulously cared for and presents a fantastic opportunity for a discerning buyer. The exterior retains its original luster with only minor, expected road wear consistent with careful use. Inside, the cabin is remarkably clean and smoke-free, featuring well-preserved upholstery and fully functional electronics. Mechanically, the car is in robust health; it has been consistently serviced, resulting in a smooth engine response and precise handling. Recent maintenance includes a fresh oil change and a thorough brake inspection, ensuring it is ready for the road immediately. With a complete service history and a clear title, this car offers a perfect blend of reliability and classic appeal.

Presenting a distinguished vehicle that exemplifies a harmonious balance of performance and sustained quality. This specimen has been meticulously maintained, ensuring mechanical integrity and a refined aesthetic presence. Offering a sophisticated driving experience, it stands as a testament to enduring engineering and represents an exceptional acquisition for the discerning motorist.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Featuring a robust powertrain and a refined interior, this unit has been rigorously inspected to ensure it meets our exacting standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Its documented service history reflects a commitment to long-term performance, positioning it as a standout selection within its class. We invite you to experience the seamless fusion of reliability and sophistication that defines this exceptional offering.

Hi there! 🚗 Are you looking for a reliable ride that’s ready for the road? I’m parting with this beauty, and it’s in wonderful shape! It’s been well-maintained, drives smoothly, and is honestly just a joy to own. It’s got plenty of life left and is looking for a great new home. Come take it for a spin!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the iconic S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and dual VANOS. The drivetrain is anchored by a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a limited-slip variable M differential. It remains mechanically robust, with essential subframe reinforcement already performed and a refreshed cooling system. The suspension geometry is dialed in, maintaining the balance and tactile steering response this chassis is renowned for. While showing honest signs of road use, it delivers peak performance and linear power delivery through the entire 8,000 RPM range.
Good condition. Regular maintenance performed. Clean title. Everything works as intended.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a refined driving experience and remains in impressive condition both mechanically and aesthetically. The exterior paint retains a deep, lustrous shine, showing only the minor, expected signs of careful road use, such as small stone chips on the front fascia. Inside, the cabin is a pristine, smoke-free environment featuring supple leather seating with no significant wear or cracking, and every electronic component—from the premium sound system to the dual-zone climate control—functions exactly as intended. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and quietly, benefited by a complete service history and a recent full synthetic oil change. The tires possess ample tread depth, and the braking system feels firm and responsive. This car has been garage-kept and treated with the utmost care, making it a reliable and sophisticated choice for any discerning buyer looking for quality without the new-car price tag.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, this automobile offers a balanced synthesis of performance and longevity. It remains in commendable condition, reflecting a history of diligent ownership and consistent servicing. This represents an exceptional acquisition for the discerning driver seeking a dependable, high-caliber driving experience without compromise.

This distinguished vehicle exemplifies a commitment to automotive excellence and mechanical integrity. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it offers a sophisticated driving experience that balances refined performance with lasting value. We invite discerning buyers to acquire this well-preserved example of superior engineering.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that still looks great on the road? I’m parting with my trusty car, and it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been well-taken care of—perfect for someone who wants a dependable vehicle without the brand-new price tag. It runs smoothly and is ready for its next adventure with you! Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

Used car in good condition. Engine runs smooth. Interior well-maintained. Clear title. Recent service complete.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and reliability. The exterior features a deep, lustrous finish with only the minor, expected signs of road use that come with careful driving. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary; the premium upholstery is supple and free of major blemishes, while all electronic features—from the intuitive infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control—function exactly as intended. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly, benefiting from a documented history of on-time oil changes and preventative maintenance. The tires have ample tread remaining, and the brake feel is firm and responsive. Whether you're navigating daily commutes or embarking on a weekend getaway, this car offers a refined driving experience that reflects its careful ownership history. It has been garage-kept and smoke-free, ensuring it stays in impressive shape for its next owner.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally maintained vehicle, representing a premier choice for the discerning driver. This unit exhibits a refined balance of mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal, having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure continued peak performance. Its history of consistent care is evident in its smooth operation and well-preserved interior. This offering provides an outstanding opportunity to acquire a high-caliber automobile that upholds our dealership's rigorous standards for quality and reliability.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies both mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for reliability and performance. Offering a sophisticated driving experience at an exceptional value, this vehicle represents a premier selection for the informed professional seeking a dependable and prestigious acquisition.

Hi there! I’m looking to find a new home for my trusty ride! It’s been such a reliable companion and is still in wonderful shape, ready for all your upcoming adventures. It drives smoothly and has been really well-loved over the years. I'm sad to see it go, but I know the next owner is going to have a blast with it! Feel free to reach out if you want to come by and take a look!

This E46 M3 is powered by the high-revving S54B32 inline-six, featuring a 11.5:1 compression ratio and individual throttle bodies for surgical throttle response. The drivetrain utilizes a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission paired with a mechanical limited-slip differential, ensuring linear power delivery through the rear wheels. The chassis remains structurally sound with documented rear subframe reinforcement and a recent Double VANOS overhaul to maintain optimal cam phasing. Suspension components feature aluminum control arms to reduce unsprung weight, preserving the communicative steering rack's precision. While the exterior displays minor road-going patina, the mechanical synchronization and valve clearances have been meticulously maintained, offering a pure analog driving experience with a 8,000 RPM redline.
Used car in good condition. Well-maintained engine. Interior is clean. Minor exterior wear. Runs smooth. Reliable daily driver.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between performance and luxury. The exterior boasts a lustrous metallic finish that has been regularly waxed, showing only minor, age-appropriate cosmetic wear such as a few small stone chips on the front fascia. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary; the premium leather upholstery is free of significant wear, and the dual-zone climate control and upgraded infotainment system operate flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is in strong health, having followed a strict preventative maintenance schedule with all service records documented and available for review. It drives straight and true, offering responsive handling and a quiet, comfortable ride. The tires have plenty of tread remaining, and the brake pads were recently replaced. This is a reliable, turn-key vehicle ready to provide its next owner with years of dependable and stylish service.

Presenting a distinguished vehicle that exemplifies dependable performance and sophisticated engineering. This unit has been meticulously maintained to ensure a seamless driving experience, offering a superior balance of luxury and utility. Our rigorous inspection process confirms its structural integrity and mechanical reliability, making it an exceptional acquisition for the discerning driver who prioritizes long-term value.
